name: unattended
description: Fully unattended engineering pipeline. Sets auto_approve=true, so confirm_repo and approve_plan fire and pass automatically. Use this for trusted CI runs / a long-lived daemon you don't want to babysit. Pair with sensible test_command + before_pr fmt/lint hooks so 'unattended' doesn't mean 'unaccountable'.

on_failure: echo 'unattended workflow failed for {{.Key}} — see goon logs --tail=100' >&2
